hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'wrangler[[:space:]]+pages[[:space:]]+deploy'; then if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE -- '--branch[= ](master|main)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"iscooked: prod deploys are human-only. Jack runs the publishing runbook (52.02) himself. Claude must not deploy."}'; exit 2; fi; fi

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+push.*origin[[:space:]]+master'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Push to master blocked. Open a PR from a feature branch."}'; exit 2; fi
